title: PDC Wafood Made Sake Pack 170g Facial Mask
detail_text: Description PDC Wafood Made Sake Pack Get smoother, whiter skin This wash-type Sake Lees*1 Face Pack is easy to use in your own home. It contains sake lees extract derived from sake lees at the Kawazu Brewery in Kumamoto prefecture. This pack cleanses melanin and ages pores to bring you closer to white, moisturized, and translucent skin. It also provides premium moisture using specially selected ingredients for beautiful skin support *3. Beautiful skin support *3: Cucumber fruit extract and saccharomyces/rice bran ferment fil trate extract, and citrus junos seed extract After washing your face, lightly dry your face with a towel. Put a cherry-sized amount of the face pack into your hand and spread evenly over your face, avoiding the eye and mouth areas. Leave it on for 5-10 minutes. Rinse off with warm water. Recommended use: 2 or 3 times per week. *1 Sake Lees Extract (Moisture-retaining ingredient) *2 Cleanses melanin and aged horny *3 Moisture-retaining ingredients

title: PAPA RECIPE Bombee Whitening Honey Mask Pack (10 Sheets)
detail_text: PAPA RECIPE Bombee Whitening Honey Mask Pack (25g X 10pcs) PAPA RECIPE Bombee Whitening Honey Mask is enriched with glutathione, diamond powder and honey extract, which are able to nourish and smooth the skin, thereby helping make your skin vibrant, bright and crystal-clear. The organic pulp mask sheet is excellent for delivering the essence, moisture and nutrients directly to the skin while increasing the absorption. Multiple Features: Whitening Moisturizing Nourishing Enhance skin elasticity How to use: After face wash use toner, apply mask and remove after 10 to 20 minutes. Tap excess amount of essence gently for absorption. ​​​​​​​
detail_html:
PAPA RECIPE Bombee Whitening Honey Mask Pack (25g X 10pcs)
PAPA RECIPE Bombee Whitening Honey Mask is enriched with glutathione, diamond powder and honey extract, which are able to nourish and smooth the skin, thereby helping make your skin vibrant, bright and crystal-clear.

The organic pulp mask sheet is excellent for delivering the essence, moisture and nutrients directly to the skin while increasing the absorption.

Multiple Features:

  • Whitening
  • Moisturizing
  • Nourishing
  • Enhance skin elasticity

How to use:

After face wash use toner, apply mask and remove after 10 to 20 minutes. Tap excess amount of essence gently for absorption.

​​​​​​​

title: BENTON Snail Bee High Content Mask pack 3ea
detail_text: BENTON Snail Bee High Content Mask pack 3ea Features This product has been renewed, you might receive the new version but it is the same product of same brand Snail Bee High Content Mask Pack is for all types of skin including sensitive and troubled skin types. Instead of water, Camellia Sinensis Leaf Water and Snail Secretion Filtrate were used. This high content mask pack uses Bee Venom, EGF and various botanical based natural ingredients to help improve your rough and damaged skin from various stress and pollution. This product's moisturizing and cooling effect helps calm skin damages caused by stress and pollution. In addition to the troubled skin care, cooling effect, moisturizing, skin soothing and skin-lifting improvement, this all-in-one functional multi-care cosmetic has functional ingredients such as Arbutin and Adenosine which helps brightening your skin and removes wrinkles. Detail How to use Prepare your skin with skin toner after washing your face. Open the packaging and place the mask gently over the face make sure it adheres to the face. After 20~30 minutes remove the mask, then pat the leftover ingredients gently into the skin. Product info. Brand : BENTON All Skin Type Volume : 20g * 10ea Made in Korea
detail_html:
BENTON Snail Bee High Content Mask pack 3ea

Features

This product has been renewed, you might receive the new version but it is the same product of same brand

Snail Bee High Content Mask Pack is for all types of skin including sensitive and troubled skin types.

Instead of water, Camellia Sinensis Leaf Water and Snail Secretion Filtrate were used.

This high content mask pack uses Bee Venom,

EGF and various botanical based natural ingredients to help improve your rough and damaged skin from various stress and pollution.

This product's moisturizing and cooling effect helps calm skin damages caused by stress and pollution.

In addition to the troubled skin care, cooling effect, moisturizing, skin soothing and skin-lifting improvement,

this all-in-one functional multi-care cosmetic has functional ingredients such as Arbutin and Adenosine which helps brightening your skin and removes wrinkles.

Detail

How to use

Prepare your skin with skin toner after washing your face.

Open the packaging and place the mask gently over the face make sure it adheres to the face.

After 20~30 minutes remove the mask, then pat the leftover ingredients gently into the skin.

Product info.

All Skin Type

Volume : 20g * 10ea

title: Foodaholic | Dewy Glow Hydrating Daily Mask Nature Skin Mask Pack (100 Sheets)
detail_text: Large Capacity Pack Each pack contains 100 sheets, providing ample supply for regular use and ensuring value for money. Convenient Individual Packs Each mask is conveniently packed for easy application and travel, making it perfect for on-the-go skincare routines. High Moisture Content Infused with a blend of cucumber, aloe, green tea, tea tree, and hyaluronic acid, these masks offer intense hydration for refreshed skin. Versatile Nutritional Benefits With 16 different variants, users can choose the mask that best suits their skin needs, from soothing to elasticity boosting. Suitable for All Skin Types Foodaholic's sheet masks are designed to be gentle and effective for all skin types, promising a nurturing experience for everyone.

page_json.description: Large Capacity PackEach pack contains 100 sheets, providing ample supply for regular use and ensuring value for money.Convenient Individual PacksEach mask is conveniently packed for easy application and travel, making it perfect for on-the-go skincare routines.High Moisture ContentInfused with a blend of cucumber, aloe, green tea, tea tree, and hyaluronic acid, these masks offer intense hydration for refreshed skin.Versatile Nutritional BenefitsWith 16 different variants, users can choose the mask that best suits their skin needs, from soothing to elasticity boosting.Suitable for All Skin TypesFoodaholic's sheet masks are designed to be gentle and effective for all skin types, promising a nurturing experience for everyone.

title: PDC Wafood Made Sake Lees Face Pack Mask (170g)
detail_text: PDC Wafood Made Sake Lees Face Pack (170g) "The sake-brewing mistress, have the youthful hand" is the Japanese saying from ancient times to the present. It means that the sake lees produced during the Sake brewing process have amazing skin care effects, which makes elder lady's hands tender and young! PDC thus developed the mask pack with the sake lees essences, rice bran extracts, cucumber extracts, and grapefruit seed extracts to provide deep hydration, brightening and fining pores effects. The "delicious" wafood are transformed into beauty care ingredients, and helps you to restore smooth and radiant skin! Product Features: • Moisturizing and nourishing: The Sake lees essence is made with the rice called“Autumn Color”grown in Kyushu, Japan, and the natural spring water, which can deeply nourishes the skin and locks in water for a long time. • Brightening: Rich in nutrients and moisture to improve the rough skin, remove aging skin and melanin, make the skin smoother and radiant. • Lovely and unique packaging: The Package design is very interesting, with stunning skin care effects, had soon become a popular skin care item on the Internet! Ingredients : • Sake lees essence, fermented rice bran extract: Effectively promotes skin metabolism, improves dry skin, prevents melanin and brightens skin. • Cucumber extract and grapefruit seed extract: Soothing, calming, moisturizing . How to use : After cleansing, lightly wipe the face with a towel, apply a proper amount of mask evenly over the entire face, avoid the eyes area, wait for 5-10 minutes, and rinse off with warm water. It is recommended to use 2-3 times a week.

title: [THE FACE SHOP] Real Nature Facial Pack 20g x 10pcs
detail_text: Drenched in a smooth serum with oil / Formula without added parabens Oriental Herb Extracting Process: The Oriental Herb Extracting Process is our special way of extracting ingredients from oriental herbs. The herbs are ground, roasted and decocted in the traditional way Air Pocket Pulp Sheet: The air pockets within the sheet contain handful of nutritional essence, providing natural moisture and nourishment to skin. How to use Wash face and apply toner Pull out mask and carefully place on face 3. Remove after 10 to 15 minutes and pat face lightly to absorb remaining essence into skin.
detail_html:
Drenched in a smooth serum with oil / Formula without added parabens

  • Oriental Herb Extracting Process: The Oriental Herb Extracting Process is our special way of extracting ingredients from oriental herbs. The herbs are ground, roasted and decocted in the traditional

    way
  • Air Pocket Pulp Sheet: The air pockets within the sheet contain handful of nutritional essence, providing natural moisture and nourishment to skin.

How to use

  1. Wash face and apply toner
  2. Pull out mask and carefully place on face
  3. 3. Remove after 10 to 15 minutes and pat face lightly to absorb remaining essence into skin.

detail_blocks.text: Drenched in a smooth serum with oil / Formula without added parabens Oriental Herb Extracting Process: The Oriental Herb Extracting Process is our special way of extracting ingredients from oriental herbs. The herbs are ground, roasted and decocted in the traditional way Air Pocket Pulp Sheet: The air pockets within the sheet contain handful of nutritional essence, providing natural moisture and nourishment to skin. product.desc:
Drenched in a smooth serum with oil / Formula without added parabens

  • Oriental Herb Extracting Process: The Oriental Herb Extracting Process is our special way of extracting ingredients from oriental herbs. The herbs are ground, roasted and decocted in the traditional

    way
  • Air Pocket Pulp Sheet: The air pockets within the sheet contain handful of nutritional essence, providing natural moisture and nourishment to skin.

How to use

  1. Wash face and apply toner
  2. Pull out mask and carefully place on face
  3. 3. Remove after 10 to 15 minutes and pat face lightly to absorb remaining essence into skin.

title: Noblesse Korean Facial Skin Care Mask Sheet Moisture Essence Face Pack
detail_text: Specifications BrandNoblesseSKU2453322613_SGAMZ-14572029572Skin Care BenefitsMoisturizing,Dryness,Blackheads,Acne Care,Dark Spot CorrectorSkin TypeNormalRecommended UserAll PeoplePack TypeSingle ItemMask TypeSheetIngredient PreferenceARBUTINSkin ConcernsAcne & Blemishes Highlights ◆ Product Name : Noblesse / Korean Facial Skin Care Mask Sheet Moisture Essence Face Pack - Description 1. Herb: Sage Leaf Extract and Centella Asiatica Extract provide bright and clean skin. 2. Red Ginseng: Red ginseng extract nourishes the tired skin and prepares it as a resilient skin. 3. Potato: Potato extract calms the skin and makes it healthy. 4. Aloe: Aloe extracts provide a moist and healthy skin. 5. Collagen: Collagen extract gives skin radiance and elasticity. 6. Snail: Snail mucus filtrate and trehalose extract give skin elasticity and shine. 7. Syn-Ake: Syn-Ake extract gives vitality and shine to your skin and gives it elasticity. 8. Q10: Q10 extracts provide rich nutrition to make skin smooth and healthy. 9. Arbutin: Arbutin and lemon extracts make your skin clear and radiant. 10. Tea Tree: Tea tree leaf extract makes the skin smooth and moist. 11. Greentea: Green tea extract makes your skin clear and moist. 12. Pomegranate: Pomegranate extract gives skin elasticity and makes skin fresh. 13. Propolis: Propolis extracts hydrate and revitalizes the skin. 14. Cucumber: Cucumber extracts make your skin clear and transparent. 15. Acai Berry: The Acai Berry Extract provides nutrients and elasticity to the skin. - How To Use 1. It trims a skin texture with the skin after wash-up. 2. Open this product and make the Mask contact the face evenly except for eyes and mouth. 3. Detach it after 10-20 minutes. The remaining contents will absorb pat lightly by hand. If you want to report an issue with this item Click Here VIEW MORE

product.highlights:
◆ Product Name :  Noblesse / Korean Facial Skin Care Mask Sheet Moisture Essence Face Pack

- Description
1. Herb: Sage Leaf Extract and Centella Asiatica Extract provide bright and clean skin.

2. Red Ginseng: Red ginseng extract nourishes the tired skin and prepares it as a resilient skin.

3. Potato: Potato extract calms the skin and makes it healthy.

4. Aloe: Aloe extracts provide a moist and healthy skin.

5. Collagen: Collagen extract gives skin radiance and elasticity. 

6. Snail: Snail mucus filtrate and trehalose extract give skin elasticity and shine.

7. Syn-Ake: Syn-Ake extract gives vitality and shine to your skin and gives it elasticity.

8. Q10: Q10 extracts provide rich nutrition to make skin smooth and healthy.

9. Arbutin: Arbutin and lemon extracts make your skin clear and radiant.

10. Tea Tree: Tea tree leaf extract makes the skin smooth and moist.

11. Greentea: Green tea extract makes your skin clear and moist.

12. Pomegranate: Pomegranate extract gives skin elasticity and makes skin fresh.

13. Propolis: Propolis extracts hydrate and revitalizes the skin.

14. Cucumber: Cucumber extracts make your skin clear and transparent.
 
15. Acai Berry: The Acai Berry Extract provides nutrients and elasticity to the skin.

- How To Use
1. It trims a skin texture with the skin after wash-up.
2. Open this product and make the Mask contact the face evenly except for eyes and mouth.
3. Detach it after 10-20 minutes. The remaining contents will absorb pat lightly by hand.
product.title: Noblesse Korean Facial Skin Care Mask Sheet Moisture Essence Face Pack

page_json.name: Noblesse Korean Facial Skin Care Mask Sheet Moisture Essence Face Pack
page_json.description: Noblesse. Product Name: Noblesse Korean Facial Skin Care Mask Sheet Moisture Essence Face Pack. Description. 1. Herb: Sage Leaf Extract and Centella Asiatica Extract provide bright and clean skin. 2. Red Ginseng: Red ginseng extract nourishes the tired skin and prepares it as a resilient skin. 3. Potato: Potato extract calms the skin and makes it healthy. 4. Aloe: Aloe extracts provide a moist and healthy skin. 5. Collagen: Collagen extract gives skin radiance and elasticity. 6. Snail: Snail mucus filtrate and trehalose extract give skin elasticity and shine. 7. Syn-Ake: Syn-Ake extract gives vitality and shine to your skin and gives it elasticity. 8. Q10: Q10 extracts provide rich nutrition to make skin smooth and healthy. 9. Arbutin: Arbutin and lemon extracts make your skin clear and radiant. 10. Tea Tree: Tea tree leaf extract makes the skin smooth and moist. 11. Greentea: Green tea extract makes your skin clear and moist. 12. Pomegranate: Pomegranate extract gives skin elasticity

title: Vaseline | Vaseline Mask Pack Daily Hydrating Nutrient Soothing 3-type x 20 sheets
detail_text: Variety of Formulas Experience diverse skincare benefits with three types of collagen-packed masks, tailored to meet your specific needs. Moisturizing Power Infused with moisture, these masks deeply hydrate, leaving skin soft and supple. Easy Application Designed for convenience, these sheet masks are easy to apply, providing a hassle-free skincare routine. Generous Quantity Each pack contains 20 sheets, ensuring ample supply for regular use and consistent skin care. Brand Reliability Trusted by consumers, Vaseline's masks offer quality and effectiveness in every sheet.
detail_html:
Variety of Formulas

Experience diverse skincare benefits with three types of collagen-packed masks, tailored to meet your specific needs.

Moisturizing Power

Infused with moisture, these masks deeply hydrate, leaving skin soft and supple.

Easy Application

Designed for convenience, these sheet masks are easy to apply, providing a hassle-free skincare routine.

Generous Quantity

Each pack contains 20 sheets, ensuring ample supply for regular use and consistent skin care.

Brand Reliability

Trusted by consumers, Vaseline's masks offer quality and effectiveness in every sheet.

aiTexts: Vaseline Mask Pack Daily Hydrating Nutrient Soothing features easy-to-use sheet masks designed for hassle-free application anytime, anywhere.
Formulated to deeply moisturize and soothe dry skin, leaving it soft and supple.
Includes daily collagen infusion to nourish and rejuvenate your skin effectively.
Each pack offers 20 sheets providing consistent hydration and long-lasting skincare benefits.
The set contains 3 different Vaseline types, delivering tailored skincare solutions for varied skin needs.

detail_html:
[FARMSTAY]Visible Difference Mask Sheet - 13 types★1 Face Mask Sheet A Day★vitality mask pack / green tea / snail / aloe / green tea / collagen / pearl / cucumber / red ginseng / horse oil / honey / pomegranate / charcoal

-Brand : Farm Stay



-Country Of Origin : KOREA

-Benefits :



-Moisturize your skin with clean ingredients



-It's effective in calming the skin



-Use 1 pack daily to make the skin elastic



-Helps make skin clear and bright

-Variations



01 GREENTEA SEED - Skin Soothing



02 SNAIL - Glossy/Elasticity



03 ACEROLA - Skin Vitality



04 ALOE - Skin Soothing



05 PEARL - Whitening



06 COLLAGEN - Vitality / Elasticity



07 RED GINSENG - Nutrition / Elasticity



08 CUCUMBER - Soothing / Moisturizing



09 BIRD'S NEST - Nourishing / Glossy



10 POMEGRANATE - Skin Vitality



11 HORSE OIL - Oil-Moisture Balance



12 Milk - Skin Moisturizing



13 CHARCOAL - Waste / Pore Care

-Manufacturing date to expiration date : 36 months

-How to use :



-Use a face wash or lotion to prepare your skin.



-Apply the mask to your face evenly.



-After 15 to 20 minutes, remove the mask and lightly tap the remaining contents on the skin for absorption.

-Ingredient



Purified water, methyl propanediol, glycereth, butylene glycol, hexanediol, nol tea extract, betaine, xanthan gum, allantoin, carbomer, ethhexyl glycerin, polysorbate 20, triethanolamine, disodium editi A, phenoxyethanol, fragrance

Thank you for visiting our shop.

product.desc:
[FARMSTAY]Visible Difference Mask Sheet - 13 types★1 Face Mask Sheet A Day★vitality mask pack / green tea / snail / aloe / green tea / collagen / pearl / cucumber / red ginseng / horse oil / honey / pomegranate / charcoal

-Brand : Farm Stay



-Country Of Origin : KOREA

-Benefits :



-Moisturize your skin with clean ingredients



-It's effective in calming the skin



-Use 1 pack daily to make the skin elastic



-Helps make skin clear and bright

-Variations



01 GREENTEA SEED - Skin Soothing



02 SNAIL - Glossy/Elasticity



03 ACEROLA - Skin Vitality



04 ALOE - Skin Soothing



05 PEARL - Whitening



06 COLLAGEN - Vitality / Elasticity



07 RED GINSENG - Nutrition / Elasticity



08 CUCUMBER - Soothing / Moisturizing



09 BIRD'S NEST - Nourishing / Glossy



10 POMEGRANATE - Skin Vitality



11 HORSE OIL - Oil-Moisture Balance



12 Milk - Skin Moisturizing



13 CHARCOAL - Waste / Pore Care

-Manufacturing date to expiration date : 36 months

-How to use :



-Use a face wash or lotion to prepare your skin.



-Apply the mask to your face evenly.



-After 15 to 20 minutes, remove the mask and lightly tap the remaining contents on the skin for absorption.

-Ingredient



Purified water, methyl propanediol, glycereth, butylene glycol, hexanediol, nol tea extract, betaine, xanthan gum, allantoin, carbomer, ethhexyl glycerin, polysorbate 20, triethanolamine, disodium editi A, phenoxyethanol, fragrance

Thank you for visiting our shop.

detail_html:
BENTON Fermentation Mask Pack 3ea

Features

Fermented ingredient and 2 types of Peptides help nourish skin and give elasticity

Naturally derived ingredients help to condition dull skin and give vitality and elasticity

Helps wrinkle improvement to inelastic skin by anti-wrinkle functional

Detail

How To Use

1. After cleansing, prepare face with a skin toner.

2. Open the packaging and smooth mask onto face.

3. After 10~20 minutes, remove mask and pat leftover essence gently onto the skin.

Product Info

All Skin Type

Volume : 20g * 3ea

Made in Korea

title: Biore / Men's Biore Pore Pack 10 Sheets
detail_text: Directions: Recommended usage once a week. 1. With dry hands, remove pore pack from sachet. With the plastic liner facing you, twist pore pack to separate slits. Peel pore pack off the plastic liner. Once sachet is opened, please use immediately. 2. Wet your nose thoroughly with water. 3. Dry your hands well, then firmly apply the smooth side onto your nose. 4. Let it dry for about 10-15 minutes until the pore pack feels firm. Do not leave on longer than recommended as pore pack may become difficult to remove. 5. Remove pore pack slowly starting at the edges, pulling towards the centre. Do not pull off pore pack from one side in a single forceful action. If pore pack has been left on for too long, wet pore pack thoroughly with water, then slowly peel it off. If there is any residue, simply wash off with water.
detail_html:
Directions: Recommended usage once a week.

1. With dry hands, remove pore pack from sachet. With the plastic liner facing you, twist pore pack to separate slits. Peel pore pack off the plastic liner. Once sachet is opened, please use immediately.

2. Wet your nose thoroughly with water.

3. Dry your hands well, then firmly apply the smooth side onto your nose.

4. Let it dry for about 10-15 minutes until the pore pack feels firm. Do not leave on longer than recommended as pore pack may become difficult to remove.

5. Remove pore pack slowly starting at the edges, pulling towards the centre. Do not pull off pore pack from one side in a single forceful action. If pore pack has been left on for too long, wet pore pack thoroughly with water, then slowly peel it off. If there is any residue, simply wash off with water.

detail_blocks.text: Directions: Recommended usage once a week. 1. With dry hands, remove pore pack from sachet. With the plastic liner facing you, twist pore pack to separate slits. Peel pore pack off the plastic liner. Once sachet is opened, please use immediately. 2. Wet your nose thoroughly with water. 3. Dry your hands well, then firmly apply the smooth side onto your nose. 4. Let it dry for about 10-15 minutes until the pore pack feels firm. Do not leave on longer than recommended as pore pack may become difficult to remove. 5. Remove pore pack slowly starting at the edges, pulling towards the centre. Do not pull off pore pack from one side in a single forceful action. If pore pack has been left on for too long, wet pore pack thoroughly with water, then slowly peel it off. If there is any residue, simply wash off with water.

Directions: Recommended usage once a week.

1. With dry hands, remove pore pack from sachet. With the plastic liner facing you, twist pore pack to separate slits. Peel pore pack off the plastic liner. Once sachet is opened, please use immediately.

2. Wet your nose thoroughly with water.

3. Dry your hands well, then firmly apply the smooth side onto your nose.

4. Let it dry for about 10-15 minutes until the pore pack feels firm. Do not leave on longer than recommended as pore pack may become difficult to remove.

5. Remove pore pack slowly starting at the edges, pulling towards the centre. Do not pull off pore pack from one side in a single forceful action. If pore pack has been left on for too long, wet pore pack thoroughly with water, then slowly peel it off. If there is any residue, simply wash off with water.
product.highlights:
• Thoroughly and instantly remove blackheads from deep within pores.
  • Larger sheet to smoothly cover the entire area of the nose.
  • Contains Menthol for a cool, refreshing sensation.
  • Use 1 to 2 times weekly for cleaner, smoother skin.

page_json.description: Biore Pore Control Sheet Mask offers effective pore control for normal skin types. This fragrance-free, multi-pack mask features a larger size for nose coverage, providing a cool menthol sensation and blackhead removal for smoother skin. - Lazada

title: BENTON Goodbye Redness Centella Mask Pack 3ea
detail_text: BENTON Goodbye Redness Centella Mask Pack 3ea Features The mild mask sheet soothes the sensitive and troubled skin with ample moisture and nutrition. Centella Asiatica leaf water and extract soothe and protect the stimulated skin. Smooth S-Cell sheet adheres delicately to the skin and conveys moisture and nutrition immediately. Detail How To Use Adhere the mask sheet, remove it after 10 ~ 20 minutes, and pat gently to help essence absorption. Product Info Brand : Benton All Skin Type Volume : 23g * 3 sheets Made in Korea

BENTON Goodbye Redness Centella Mask Pack 3ea

Features

The mild mask sheet soothes the sensitive and troubled skin with ample moisture and nutrition.

product.desc:
NOBLESSE"Daily Care Mask" that makes your skin moist and healthy


★Fermented essence mask
★A mask sheet filled with ampoules

★Mask optimized for dry skin

★Excellent skin adhesion, so essence ingredients are delivered to the skin quickly


★Three layers of German natural pulp for skin

1 Herb-Revitalizing Skin
2 Red Ginseng-skin elasticity
3 Potato-Skin Soothing + Skin Brightening
4 Aloe-Skin Soothing + Skin Moisturizing
5 Collagen-skin elasticity + skin moisturizing
6 Snail-skin elasticity and shine
7 Syn-ake-Resilience and vitality to the skin
8 Q10-Skin elasticity + skin nutrition
9 Arbutin-Skin Moisturizing + Skin Brightening
10 Tea Tree-Skin Soothing + Skin Pore Care
11 Green Tea-Skin nutrition + skin brightening
12 Pomegranate-skin elasticity
13 Propolis-Skin Moisture + Skin Soothing
14 Cucumber-Skin Cleansing + Skin Soothing
15 Acai Berry-Skin nutrition + skin elasticity

======================================================


Opportunity to get a mask pack with high satisfaction at a reasonable price

INNISFREE Jeju Root Energy Mask

  1. Carrot : Brightening & Moisturizing : 2023.12.14

- Contains carrot extract grown in clean Jeju land and 5-fold hyaluronic acid complex.

- Transparent moisture mask that keeps dry skin moist and clear

  1. Kohlrabi : Brightening & Firming : 2023.10.19

- Contains kohlrabi extract grown in clean Jeju land and 5-layered hyaluronic acid complex.

- A transparent firming mask that cares for dull and weak skin to bright and strong skin.

title: Ekel Placenta Mask Pack 25ml x 10s
detail_text: Ekel Placenta Mask Pack is a single use sheet mask soaked in essence rich with plant placenta. The thin, breathable cotton sheet sits closely against the face for full essence absorption. Plant placenta complex helps boost skin radiance and a more youthful feel. Skin feels refreshed and visibly cared for after 15 to 20 minutes of relaxing wear.
